name: pi-config
//workspaces: npm workspaces are intentionally NOT enabled. extensions/subagent and extensions/cwd-skills do not yet have package.json files; activating workspaces here would break root npm install. Track enabling this in docs/INSTALLATION_INFRA_PLAN.md.

scripts.ci:typecheck: npm run extension:typecheck && npm run analytics:typecheck
scripts.ci:test: npm run extension:test && npm run extensions:test && npm run analytics:test
